title: thelypteris confluens var. pubescens
intro: Thelypteris confluens var. pubescens, also known as the pubescent shore fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to tropical regions and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and treating skin conditions due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The pubescent shore fern can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
